raw_input.title: Apply Here
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Do not see your role? Apply anyway. Remote first. Generic open application. Please mention the magic word WHOA when applying to show you read the job post completely. Anti-spam applicant marker.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer. Needs concrete role requirements to assess fit.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: generic open application with anti-spam magic word should be SKIP, not MAYBE/top-tier.
